ŌØō Help & Tips
­¤æŗ Welcome to EOW Bhopal Dashboard
Óż»Óż╣ÓżŠÓżü office ÓżĢÓźć ÓżĖÓż¼ records (Complaints, RC, PE, Court Cases, Pragati, Establishment etc.) ek hi jagah maintain hote hain.

­¤Ä» Aap KYA Kar Sakte Hain

  • Ō£ģ Sab tabs me data dekh sakte hain
  • Ō£ģ Nayi entries (Complaint/RC/PE/Court Case etc) add kar sakte hain
  • Ō£ģ Existing entries edit kar sakte hain
  • Ō£ģ Reports / PDF generate kar sakte hain
  • Ō£ģ Search aur filters use kar sakte hain

­¤Ü½ Yeh sirf SP saab ke liye hai

  • Ō£Ś Delete koi bhi entry
  • Ō£Ś Avkash applications Approve/Reject
  • Ō£Ś Courts Master Manage
  • Ō£Ś Password reset
­¤ÆĪ Pro Tip:
Agar button nahi dikh raha, woh aapke role me available nahi hai. Normal hai, tension na lo.

1. Nayi Complaint Add Karna
Complaints tab ŌåÆ "+ Add" ŌåÆ form fill ŌåÆ Save
2. Court Case Add Karna
Court Cases ŌåÆ "+ Add" ŌåÆ Court choose ŌåÆ Source Enquiry zaroor link karen ŌåÆ Save
3. Specific Case Search
Tab kholen ŌåÆ search bar me keyword (No, name, IO) type karen
4. Year-wise Filter
Tab me year sub-tabs (2024, 2025) par tap karen
5. Report Generate Karna
Reports tab ŌåÆ Quick Preset YA manual filters ŌåÆ ­¤öŹ Preview ŌåÆ ­¤ōä Export PDF
6. File Attach Karna
Case open karen ŌåÆ Attachments section ŌåÆ "+ Add File" ŌåÆ PDF/Image select
7. Linked Enquiry Dekhna
Court Cases me "Related" column ŌåÆ golden badge (C-15/24 ŌåÆ) ŌåÆ tap ŌåÆ linked enquiry detail
8. Pragati History
Pragati Prativedan tab ŌåÆ "­¤ōŖ Case Timeline" button ŌåÆ chronological history
Problem Solution
Login fail ho rahaPassword sahi type karen, internet check karen, sahi dropdown choose
Page load nahi ho rahaRefresh (Ctrl+R / Cmd+R), internet check, alag browser try
Save kaam nahi kar rahaRequired fields (*) sab bhare hain check, refresh, retry
Hindi text galat dikh rahaChrome / Safari use karen (latest version)
Search me result nahiPartial keyword try, spelling check
"Duplicate" errorSame No+Year combo exists. Verify ya different number
PDF generate nahi ho rahaBrowser settings me popup blocker disable karen
Account locked (5 wrong)10 min wait OR SP saab se reset karwaen
­¤öÉ Security Golden Rules:
  • Apna password KISI ke saath share NA karen
  • Public/shared computer pe logout zaroor karen
  • 5 wrong attempts ŌåÆ 10 min lock automatic
  • Password leak ka shaq ŌåÆ turant SP saab ko bataen
  • Login URL public WhatsApp groups me NA share karen
­¤ō▒ Mobile Use ke liye:
  • Sirf apne personal phone par use karen
  • Public WiFi se sensitive data avoid karen
  • Screenshot share karte time PII (names, contact) hide karen
  • "Save Password" browser feature shared device pe USE NA karen
Ō£ģ Logout Karna Bhool Gaye:
Top right me apna naam ke saath "Logout" button hai. Office se nikalte time, ya dusra koi computer use karne se pehle ŌĆö zaroor logout karen.
­¤ÆĪ Detailed PDF guide SP saab ne WhatsApp pe bheja hai

­¤ōå Subscribe ŌĆö Apple Calendar / Google
­¤ō▓
Subscribe karen ŌåÆ sabhi directives ki deadlines apke Apple Calendar / Google Calendar me automatically appear hongi. Naye directives bhi auto-sync ho jaayenge. Smart reminders 1 din pehle + uss din 9 AM milenge.
­¤ō▒ iPhone / iPad (Apple Calendar)
  1. Settings ŌåÆ Calendar ŌåÆ Accounts
  2. Add Account ŌåÆ Other ŌåÆ Add Subscribed Calendar
  3. Server me yeh URL paste karen:
  1. Next ŌåÆ Save ŌĆö done!
­¤ÜĆ Direct subscribe (iPhone par tap karen)
­¤Æ╗ Mac (Calendar.app)
  1. Calendar app ŌåÆ File ŌåÆ New Calendar Subscription
  2. Yeh URL paste karen:
  1. Location: iCloud (sab devices par sync)
  2. Auto-refresh: Every 15 minutes
­¤īÉ Google Calendar
  1. Google Calendar ŌåÆ Other calendars ŌåÆ + ŌåÆ From URL
  2. Upar wala HTTPS URL paste karen
  3. ŌÜĀ Google calendar 12-24 ghante me refresh karta hai (slow)
ŌÜĀ Yeh feature kaam karne ke liye Edge Function deploy hona zaroori hai. Deployment guide: PHASE2-Calendar-Setup-Guide.md
